message:
fix: recover from jsonschema library panics in compileSchema

The jsonschema/v5 library has multiple panic() sites that can fire on
malformed tool schemas from MCP servers or plugins. Add recover() in
compileSchema to convert panics to errors, preventing process crashes
during session initialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
